prompt: convert the photo taken by james webb telescope and convert it into the photos taken by hubble
remarks: it should be less clear than this one with more black background due to hubble using visible light. advance score : if the number diffraction change from 6 to 4 due to different mirrors
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the James Webb Space Telescope image of the Pillars of Creation, to render it with the visual characteristics of a Hubble Space Telescope image. This involves adjusting the color palette towards bluer tones for the nebulosity and dust, making the dust structures appear more opaque, and transforming the prominent 8-pointed star diffraction spikes into the characteristic 4-pointed spikes seen in Hubble imagery.
objects: 8-pointed star diffraction spikes (should not be present)
